bootes_void.note: Boötes Void — 330Mly diameter, ~60 galaxies where ~2000 expected

virgo_cluster.note: Virgo Cluster — nearest rich cluster, M87/Virgo A 6.5B solar masses

sgr_a_star.note: Sgr A* — Milky Way SMBH, 4M solar masses

eridanus_void.note: Eridanus Void — large underdensity south of equator

protocol: 15-min whitened PSD segments. L1 segments classified by which sky target is above 20° elevation. Void mean vs mass-dense mean compared with t-test and Mann-Whitney U. If mass_mean > void_mean with p<0.05: mass-density dependent.
